text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "WmiPrvSE.exe connected to the LSASS named pipe, which is a common technique for credential dumping. This is further supported by loading dpapi.dll and active directory related DLLs and registry access.",
  "indicators": [
    "pipe_connect to \\lsass",
    "load dpapi.dll",
    "load dsparse.dll",
    "load activeds.dll",
    "reg_create HKU\\.DEFAULT\\Software\\Microsoft\\ADs\\Providers\\LDAP"
  ]
}
